column1: # Sample triples from the SNOMED CT-aligned clinical KG.
# Tab-separated. Header below is for readability only.
# This is an ILLUSTRATIVE subset of the ~180,000 edges in the full KG.
# It includes the triples returned for the worked example in paper §3.4
# plus representative coverage of all 13 relation types and all 6 entity
# types. Full SNOMED CT concept descriptions are not redistributed here;
# CUIs can be mapped to full descriptions via UMLS (https://uts.nlm.nih.gov).
